hero.sub: Modern websites, CRM systems & UI/UX design — I turn your ideas into products that actually work.

services.label: Services
services.heading: What I do
services.s1_desc: Modern interfaces and landing pages that reflect your brand and convert visitors into customers.
services.s2_desc: Custom client management systems built for your business — automate, track, and scale.

about.label: About
about.heading: Who am I?
about.bio: I'm Ferudin — web designer & developer. Vibe coding is my path: I rapidly turn ideas into prototypes and prototypes into real products. Every project is a problem solved.
